asset.title: App Variance Fill
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates automated variance calculations in a financial spreadsheet using collaborative agents, supported by a real-time trace log.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates agents locking cells, calculating variance percentages, and merging results.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the entire sequence from initiating collaboration to the final merged state.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed UI with clear visual hierarchy between the spreadsheet and trace log.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with NodeRoom's core concepts of spreadsheets, agents, and trace logs.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state changes and trace updates.

legibility.evidence: Spreadsheet values and status banners are highly readable, though trace text is slightly dense.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly applicable to financial analysts automating variance analysis.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the step-by-step execution and agent locking mechanisms.

observedEvidence: Spreadsheet UI with Q2/Q3 financial data
Run collaboration button and active state
Agent locking indicators (+RA) in the Variance column
Real-time Room trace updates showing agent actions

defects.observed: The transition during agent execution is rapid, making it slightly hard to track individual lock releases.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the delay between agent steps in the demo recording.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom agents collaborate to lock, calculate, and merge variance analysis directly within a financial spreadsheet.
